title: Put Indian students’ health at the centre of nation-building
description: We speak of Viksit Bharat, demographic dividend, innovation, start-ups, artificial intelligence and Olympic dreams. But the first infrastructure of a nation is the bodies and minds of its children

title: Psychologists shouldn't replace thinking with AI, researchers warn
description: For some psychologists, it's becoming more common to use AI systems to replace human thinking in research. That's a very risky choice based on misconceptions, warn Iris van Rooij and Olivia Guest in a new paper published today in Current Directions in Psychological Science. "Research based on artificial intelligence models will never be an adequate substitute for understanding and replicating human thought."

title: Brokerage sees AI supply chain as winner in truce
description: The artificial intelligence (AI) supply chain is one of the most attractive investment themes should a potential peace agreement between the US and Iran materialise, says Finnomena Funds, noting it could be a catalyst for a global market rally.

title: AI vital signs system outperforms fixed-threshold ICU monitoring
description: Researchers have developed an artificial intelligence-based patient monitoring system they say can identify signs of clinical deterioration earlier and more accurately than existing approaches. The system could help hospital staff intervene before a patient's condition becomes critical. Details are discussed in the International Journal of Ad Hoc and Ubiquitous Computing.

title: Jeff Bezos backs AI materials startup CuspAI in $400M round at $2.6 billion valuation
description: CuspAI, a UK startup using artificial intelligence to discover new materials, is reportedly raising $400 million in funding at a $2.6 billion valuation, according to the Financial Times. title: Nvidia Returns To The Bond Market With A $25 Billion Sale
description: The chipmaker had not borrowed in the public bond market since 2021. Its first sale in five years tells you how far the cost of building artificial intelligence has now reached into the staid world of investment-grade credit.
content: Bankers have a phrase for a company that borrows when it does not obviously need to: filling the barn before the storm. On June 15, Nvidia did exactly that. The company sold $25 billion of senior unsecured notes, its first trip to the public bond mar... [4649 chars]
